titleStmt.title: SII 34.377: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 377. Kuḷattūr, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the ruined Siva temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 9th year = A.D. 1225.
Gift of land as kuḍi-nīṅgā-dēvadāna to the temple of Sundara-Chōḻīśvaram at Kūḻai-kuḷattūr in Uṟattūr-kūṟṟam of Iraṭṭapāḍikoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu by a temple girl called Ammai Āḻvi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīcOnāṭu koṇṭaruḷiya cuntirapāṇṭiya tEvaṟku
yāṇṭu 9 nāyaṉār cuntaracōḷiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku kuṭinīṅkāt tēvatāṉamāka
kaḷḷapaṟṟilē villi nallaṉum villi vīraṉum pakkalē kuḷattūr vayalil nīrnilam paḷ
ḷakkuḻicceyyai vilaikoṇṭu nāyaṉāṟku kuṭi nīṅkātēvatāṉamāka viṭṭēṉ ca
ṟa yiltuṭarāṇṭārkōyil tēvaraṭiyāḷ Ammai Āḻvi Umaiyāṇṭāṉēṉ I
nnilattukku pacāṉattu cūlakkālāl nel Irukalamum virai kala nellum Eḷḷuk kuṟuṇi
kkum varaku Irutūṇiyum tiṉaikkut tūṇip patakkum Ippaṭiyāl kaṭamai nāyaṉāṟku Aḷa
vēṉāka cammatittēṉ Ammai yāḻvi Umaiyāṇṭāḷēṉ
Digital edition of SII 34.377 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
